creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit 9dcbff870a876642120cd71a51d1e95c7362817f
Author:     Yusuf Yaman <nxjoseph@protonmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2024-09-23 23:20:44 +0000
Commit:     Vladimir Druzenko <vvd@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-09-23 23:22:49 +0000

    mail/hydroxide: switched to upstream

    Port has been switched to use upstream because I think it's better to
    just use a patch rather than forking the upstream and making the
    change there.

    PR:     281669

 mail/hydroxide/Makefile                           |  4 ++--
 mail/hydroxide/distinfo                           |  6 +++---
 mail/hydroxide/files/patch-config_config.go (new) | 17 +++++++++++++++++
 3 files changed, 22 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
